title: Waking Night Extra Care Support Worker
description:
Creative Support is looking for a caring, dynamic and highly motivated Waking Night Support Worker to join our friendly team in Sheffield. You will be responsible for providing person-centred support to individuals with a range of needs during night hours, ensuring their safety, comfort and wellbeing.

You will carry out regular checks, respond to any incidents or emergencies, and support individuals with personal care where required. The role also involves completing accurate records and maintaining a calm and supportive environment throughout the night.

You will work as part of a team and liaise with colleagues to ensure continuity of care. You must be reliable, attentive and able to work independently during night shifts.

Benefits of working with Creative Support:

- Competitive pay and a pension with company contribution
- 28 days annual leave
- Company paid enhanced DBS for all staff
- Free employee support programme
- Support to complete the Care Certificate and Social Care Diploma
- Full training provided

Vacancy Reference Number: 85710

Applications must be made via the Creative Support website.

We are a passionate, inclusive and anti-racist organisation committed to equality and diversity. Applications are reviewed as received. We can only accept applications from candidates who are eligible to work in the UK.

title: Support Worker
description:
We are looking for a compassionate and dedicated Support Worker to join our team in Rotherham. You will provide person-centred care to individuals with a variety of needs, supporting them to live independently and achieve their goals.

Your role will include assisting with daily living tasks, personal care, medication support and engaging individuals in community-based activities. You will build positive relationships and promote independence and wellbeing.

You will be required to maintain accurate records and follow safeguarding procedures at all times.

Full training and ongoing support will be provided.

Benefits include competitive salary, career development opportunities and a supportive working environment.

title: Healthcare Assistant
description:
As a Healthcare Assistant, you will support patients in a clinical setting, assisting with personal care, mobility and basic clinical tasks under supervision.

You will work as part of a multidisciplinary team, ensuring high standards of care and patient safety. Duties include monitoring patients, recording observations and supporting daily routines.

This role offers flexible working patterns and opportunities to gain experience in a variety of healthcare environments.

Previous experience in a healthcare setting is desirable but not essential as training will be provided.

title: Care Assistant
description:
As a Care Assistant you will provide high-quality care and support to residents, assisting with personal care, mobility and daily living tasks.

You will help maintain a safe and welcoming environment and support residents to maintain independence and dignity.

You will work as part of a team and follow care plans to meet individual needs.

Full training and career progression opportunities are available.

title: Support Worker
description:
Mencap is seeking passionate Support Workers to join our team in Sheffield. You will support people with learning disabilities to live independently and achieve their personal goals.

Duties include supporting with daily activities, personal care and accessing the community. You will promote inclusion, independence and wellbeing.

You will receive full training and ongoing support in a rewarding and inclusive environment.

title: Relief Support Worker
description:
We are looking for Relief Support Workers to join our services in Sheffield, providing flexible support to individuals with a range of needs.

You will deliver person-centred care, support daily living activities and encourage independence.

This role offers flexible shifts and is ideal for individuals seeking varied work patterns.

Training and support will be provided.
